title: sambucus phyteumoides
intro: Sambucus phyteumoides, a lesser-known species of the elderberry plant, is a flowering shrub native to certain regions of Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as colds and flu, due to its high content of bioflavonoids and anthocyanins. The health benefits of Sambucus phyteumoides include its potential to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Sambucus phyteumoides is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in the production of elderberry syrup and other supplements.
